Give everything to Anahata ❤️
Força Barça!

  • Overview
  • Class
  • Use

  • Deprecated
  • Index

  1. uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
  2. AgiPanel

Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.AgiPanel

Packages that use AgiPanel
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.desktop.swing
Provides the core Swing UI components and container orchestration for the standalone Anahata ASI desktop application.
uno.anahata.asi.nb
Core classes for the NetBeans integration of the Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.render
Provides the visual rendering layer for agentic file write operations within NetBeans.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.resources
Provides the visual and interactive layer for NetBeans-specific resource handles.
uno.anahata.asi.swing
Provides the foundational Swing UI components for managing and switching between multiple AI agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.chat
Core chat interface components for the Anahata ASI Swing UI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.config
Provides the configuration and metabolic management components for the Anahata Swing UI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context
Provides components and hierarchical models for the ASI Context Explorer.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context.gc
Provides UI components for monitoring and managing the Context Window Garbage Collection (CwGC).
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.input
Provides the high-fidelity user input components for the Anahata Swing UI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message
Contains UI components for rendering different types of messages in the conversation.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part
Provides base classes and factories for rendering individual parts of an ASI message.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.text
Provides specialized renderers for different segments of a text message part.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool
Provides UI components for rendering tool-related message parts.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool.param
Provides specialized renderers for individual tool parameters.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources
Provides UI components for managing and interacting with multimodal resources.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources.view
Provides specialized UI components for viewing and editing managed resources.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.status
Provides UI components for monitoring the real-time health and usage of an AGI session.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.audio
Provides the reactive Swing UI components for multimodal audio interaction.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.internal
Internal Swing utilities and bridge components for Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.toolkit
Swing-specific toolkit implementations and context abstractions for Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.toolkit.render
Specialized rendering subsystem for Anahata Toolkits in a Swing environment.
